## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] Event IDs are kebab-case and unique
- [ ] Dates are in AG (negative for BG)
- [ ] Significance level is justified
- [ ] Sources are cited in the `books` field
- [ ] Any date ambiguity is noted in the `detailed` field
